# boxer_external_identity (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the principal.
- `identity_provider` (String) The identity provider that the external identity belongs to.
- `principal` (Attributes) The principal ID associated to the external identity. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--principal))
- `validator_schema_id` (String) The schema ID of the validator associated with the external identity.

<a id="nestedatt--principal"></a>
### Nested Schema for `principal`

Required:

- `principal_id` (String) The unique identifier of the principal associated with the external identity.
- `schema_id` (String) The schema ID of the principal associated with the external identity.
